center.name: 南極半島
center.summary: 南極半島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括黑颈天鹅、长眉企鹅、Imperial shag，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The imperial shag or imperial cormorant (Leucocarbo atriceps) is a black-and-white cormorant native to southern South America, islands of the Subantarctic, and the Antarctic Peninsula, primarily in rocky coastal regions, but locally also at large inland lakes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|200px|A colony climbing in Cooper Island (South Georgia)|Cooper Bay, South Georgia A 1993 review estimated that the macaroni was the most abundant species of penguin, with a minimum of 11,841,600 pairs worldwide. Macaroni penguins range from the Subantarctic to the Antarctic Peninsula; at least 216 breeding colonies at 50 sites have been recorded. In South America, macaroni penguins are found in southern Chile, the Falkland Islands, South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands, and South Orkney Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Vagrants have been found on Juan Fernández Island, the South Orkney Islands, the South Shetland Islands, and the Antarctic Peninsula. The black-necked swan inhabits freshwater marshes and swamps, shallow lakes, brackish lagoons, and sheltered coastal sites
